prose.en: Prevent unauthorized information transfer via shared resources in accordance with {param:sc-04.02_odp} when system processing explicitly switches between different information classification levels or security categories.

guidance.en: Changes in processing levels can occur during multilevel or periods processing with information at different classification levels or security categories. It can also occur during serial reuse of hardware components at different classification levels. Organization-defined procedures can include approved sanitization processes for electronically stored information.

prose.en: unauthorized information transfer via shared resources is prevented in accordance with {param:sc-04.02_odp} when system processing explicitly switches between different information classification levels or security categories.

objects.en: procedures addressing information protection in shared system resources
system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms preventing the unauthorized transfer of information via shared system resources

guidelines.en: procedures to prevent unauthorized information transfer via shared resources are defined;
